title: Unethly Origin
body:
# Unethly Origin - Addon for Origins Mod

**New Origin: Unethly**

Unleash the power of the night with the Unethly origin. With its unique set of powers, the Unethly will give you a whole new way to experience the darkness.

## Powers

- **Poisonous Fur** - When attacked, give poison effect (power based on moon phase) and any armor you have equipped will slowly dissolve.

- **Life in Darkness** - You are able to hide and see in darkness.

- **Starlight Attack** - When attacking, give darkness effect (power based on moon phase) and chance of giving wither effect (power based on moon phase), but after attacking you start glowing, making you visible.

- **Velvet Paws** - Shhhh... Kitty! You can climb, run faster, scare creepers and take no fall damage!

- **Meat Eater** - You can only eat meat.

- **Big Cat** - You are bigger than player and have natural armor.

- **Light over Darkness** - After being in the sun you will become weaker!

- **Bad Miner Paws** - You are slower in mining.

**Experience the darkness in a whole new way with the Unethly Origin mod for the Origins mod.**

Try it out now and see how it changes your gameplay experience.
